<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally.
- [ ] New behavior has tests where practical.
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` and/or `GHOSTTY_PARITY.md`) when behavior changes.
- [ ] The change is focused; unrelated cleanups are in a separate PR.
- [ ] No build artifacts, secrets, or personal paths are included.
